alt: Photograph of a hand holding a phone showing a UNT Go screen depicting the page allowing accept or decline of financial aid. Includes the words UNT Go has rolled out a new feature! Now you can accept or decline your financial aid, right from the app! Keep watching for more features coming soon. And if you haven’t downloaded UNT Go yet, what are you waiting for? Classes Today. Career Tomorrow. You don’t have to give up your summer to get ahead. See when registration begins for you at registration.unt.edu.
